title: Air Dry Clay, 24 Colors Ultra Light Modeling Clay, iFergoo Magic Clay DIY Creative Modeling Dough with Project Booklet
features: Rich and bright colors - 24 colours of air dry modelling clay, 3 x clay tools, 1 x tutorial book. To prevent the danger of suffocation, we do not include small. Perfectly meet children’s desire of make creative beautiful crafts, and the colorful clay will be loved by them.

Safety Material - Strictly complies with the ASTM D-4236 and CE (EN-71) standards and requirements. Modeling clay is made of non-toxic, gluten-free, and BPA-free materials. Perfect suitable for ages 3+ kids, younger kids should play under adult supervision.

Soft & No-Baking Air Dry Clay - The modeling clay is air dry only, non-bakeable. The magic clay can be air dry in 24 to 48 hours (depending on the size of the model). So the air dry clay is easy to shape, bend, stretch, and mix that easy for toddler's hands. And it won't stick to your hands during use.

Great Value - iFergoo magic clay is a great fun toy for kids to stay away from electronic products. 24 Brightness colors modeling clay and 3 tools can inspire a kid's creativity, exercise their hand-eye coordination ability and help kids enhance their logical thinking ability, confidence and sensory development.

Idea Gifts for Kids - 24 Colors modeling magic clay is best learning toys for boys and girls, a unique gift. Can be sent as a Children's day present, home decoration, table toys, tactile toys, language development, learning tool, so on.In addition, If you have any problem with iFergoo modeling clay, please contact us anytime.

If your product is not working properly, Please talk to us and we will solve the problem for you as soon as possible. Can I colour a piece made from air dry clay? Yes, you can. Can I use things made of clay outdoors? We do not recommend that you leave your clay creations outside as they will deteriorate in the moist air. However, you can coat it with a waterproof paint or place it in an airtight container to prevent it from coming into contact with moist air.
